name: fitz

metadata.name: fitz
metadata.summary: Fitz: Workflow Mangement for neuroimaging data.

documentation: UNKNOWN

modules.name: scripts.log2design
documentation: !/usr/bin/env python
Create Lyman/Fitz style long flat Design Files from plain-text onset files
EKK / June 2015
Python 2/3 compatibile, depends on Pandas and Numpy/Scipy

functions.name: scripts.log2design.load_onsets
documentation:
Read onsets file and add metadata from their filenames.
Return one concatenated pandas dataframe with all trials as rows.

functions.name: scripts.log2design.onsets_for
documentation:
Inputs:
  * Condition Label to grab onsets, durations & amplitudes for.
  * Pandas Dataframe for current run containing onsets values as columns.

Outputs:
  * Returns a dictionary of extracted values for onsets, durations, etc.
  * Returns None if there are no onsets.

functions.name: scripts.log2design._lists_to_scipy
documentation:
Inputs:
  * List of dicts (one dict for each condition)

    [{'name':'Low','durations':0,'onsets':[1,3,5]},
     {'name':'Hi', 'durations':0, 'onsets':[2,4,6]}]

    - Or with Parametric Modulators -
    [{'name':'Low','durations':0,'onsets':[1,3,5], 'pmod':[
       {'name': 'RT', 'poly':1, 'param':[42,13,666]}]},
     {'name':'High',, 'durations':0, 'onsets':[2,4,6]}]

Outputs:
  * Dict of scipy arrays for keys names, durations and onsets
    that can be written using scipy.io.savemat

functions.name: fitz.tools.graphutils.find_mapnodes
documentation: Given a workflow, return a list of MapNode names.

functions.name: fitz.tools.graphutils.find_nested_workflows
documentation: Given a workflow, find nested workflow objects.

functions.name: fitz.tools.graphutils.make_subject_source
documentation: Generate a source node with iterables over a subject_id list.

functions.name: fitz.tools.graphutils.list_out_file
documentation: Return a _list_outputs function for a single out_file.

classes.name: fitz.tools.graphutils.InputWrapper

methods.name: fitz.tools.graphutils.InputWrapper.connect_inputs
documentation: Connect stereotyped inputs to the input IdentityInterface.
Implements connections between DataGrabber and workflow inputs.

classes.name: fitz.tools.graphutils.OutputWrapper

methods.name: fitz.tools.graphutils.OutputWrapper.set_mapnode_substitutions
documentation: Find mapnode names and add datasink substitutions to sort by run.

methods.name: fitz.tools.graphutils.OutputWrapper.add_regexp_substitutions
documentation: Safely set subsitutions implemented with regular expressions.

methods.name: fitz.tools.graphutils.OutputWrapper.set_subject_container
documentation: Store results by subject at highest level.

methods.name: fitz.tools.graphutils.OutputWrapper.sink_outputs
documentation: Connect the outputs of a workflow to a datasink.
Implements connections between workflow outputs and DataSink.
